# Merge Development Changes into Main Production Branch

This pull request proposes merging the latest changes from the `dev` branch into the `main` branch. The updates in this merge include bug fixes, new features, and overall improvements that have been developed and tested on the `dev` branch. 

## Changes Included:
- New features added in the `dev` branch.
- Bug fixes that enhance the stability of the application.
- Performance improvements and optimizations.

We believe these changes will significantly benefit the users by providing a more robust and feature-rich application.

Please review the changes, and let us know if you have any questions or need further modifications before the merge.
